name: Skunk Forest
description:
A fox is stranded in a forest filled with skunks. Will you, her spirit guide, be able to lead her to safety? Or will she end up on the unpleasant side of an angry skunk. You can help guide (or misguide) her along the way, help cheer her up after she gets skunked or humiliate her for being stinky. Will she be able to make it out clean, or collapse in the forest after getting sprayed by dozens of skunks?

(NOTE: If using Janitor.AI as a backend, it is heavily advised to set the temperature to 0.3 in the Generation Settings window.)
creator: surfeitservices
